issues.message: Computed background-color value "oklab(0.999994 0.0000455678 0.0000200868 / 0.9)" on <thead> (“EventDateVenueTickets SoldStatus”) does not map to a known design token.
issues.suggestion: If this is intentional, ignore the warning. Otherwise, use a Marigold variant or a theme-rui token instead of a hard-coded value.

issues.message: <Inline> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Inline>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: Touch target too small at mobile (375px): a elements are 68x20px (minimum 24x24px per WCAG 2.5.8).
issues.suggestion: Increase the clickable area. Marigold interactive components have built-in minimum sizes — check if custom styling reduces the target.

issues.message: Page should contain a level-one heading (page-has-heading-one)
issues.suggestion: Add a `<Headline level={1}>` component for the page title — it renders an `<h1>`. Import Headline from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Interactive element <a> (a) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

sourceCode:
import { useState } from 'react'; import { Accordion, AppLayout, Badge, Breadcrumbs, Button, Card, Columns, DatePicker, Dialog, Divider, Headline, Inline, Inset, Menu, NumberField, RouterProvider, SearchField, SectionMessage, Select, Sidebar, Stack, Switch, Table, Tabs, Text, TextArea, TextField, Tooltip, TopNavigation, } from '@marigold/components'; type Page = 'dashboard' | 'events' | 'attendees' | 'reports' | 'settings'; const PAGE_LABELS: Record = { dashboard: 'Dashboard', events: 'Events', attendees: 'Attendees', reports: 'Reports', settings: 'Settings', }; // ─── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── /** Four equal columns */ const FourCols = ({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) => { const items = Array.isArray(children) ? children : [children]; const cols = items.map(() => 1 as number | 'fit'); return ( {children} ); }; const StatusBadge = ({ status }: { status: string }) => { if (status === 'On Sale') return On Sale; if (status === 'Sold Out') return Sold Out; if (status === 'Draft') return Draft; return {status}; }; // 30 days before 2026-06-23 = 2026-05-24 const isActive = (lastActiveDate: string) => new Date(lastActiveDate) >= new Date('2026-05-24'); // ─── Data ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const upcomingEventsData = [ { id: '1', event: 'Summer Music Fest', date: 'Jul 14, 2026', venue: 'Central Park', tickets: 450, status: 'On Sale' }, { id: '2', event: 'Tech Summit 2026', date: 'Jul 20, 2026', venue: 'Convention Center', tickets: 320, status: 'On Sale' }, { id: '3', event: 'Art Expo Berlin', date: 'Jul 28, 2026', venue: 'Gallery Hall', tickets: 200, status: 'Sold Out' }, { id: '4', event: 'Comedy Night', date: 'Aug 3, 2026', venue: 'The Laugh Factory', tickets: 95, status: 'Draft' }, { id: '5', event: 'Jazz in the Park', date: 'Aug 10, 2026', venue: 'Riverside Park', tickets: 260, status: 'On Sale' }, { id: '6', event: 'Food & Wine Festival',date: 'Aug 17, 2026', venue: 'Downtown Square', tickets: 544, status: 'Sold Out' }, ]; const allEventsData = [ { id: '1', name: 'Summer Music Fest', date: 'Jul 14, 2026', location: 'Central Park, NYC', capacity: 500, status: 'On Sale' }, { id: '2', name: 'Tech Summit 2026', date: 'Jul 20, 2026', location: 'Convention Center, SF', capacity: 400, status: 'On Sale' }, { id: '3', name: 'Art Expo Berlin', date: 'Jul 28, 2026', location: 'Gallery Hall, Berlin', capacity: 200, status: 'Sold Out' }, { id: '4', name: 'Comedy Night', date: 'Aug 3, 2026', location: 'The Laugh Factory, LA', capacity: 150, status: 'Draft' }, { id: '5', name: 'Jazz in the Park', date: 'Aug 10, 2026', location: 'Riverside Park, Chicago', capacity: 300, status: 'On Sale' }, { id: '6', name: 'Food & Wine Festival', date: 'Aug 17, 2026', location: 'Downtown Square, Austin', capacity: 600, status: 'Sold Out' }, ]; const attendeesData = [ { id: '1', name: 'Alice Johnson', email: 'alice@example.com', events: 5, lastActive: '2026-06-15' }, { id: '2', name: 'Bob Smith', email: 'bob@example.com', events: 3, lastActive: '2026-06-20' }, { id: '3', name: 'Carol White', email: 'carol@example.com', events: 8, lastActive: '2026-05-10' }, { id: '4', name: 'David Brown', email: 'david@example.com', events: 1, lastActive: '2026-06-22' }, { id: '5', name: 'Emma Davis', email: 'emma@example.com', events: 12, lastActive: '2026-04-30' }, { id: '6', name: 'Frank Wilson', email: 'frank@example.com', events: 4, lastActive: '2026-06-18' }, ]; const topEventsData = [ { id: '1', event: 'Summer Music Fest', date: 'Jul 14, 2026', attendees: 450, capacity: 500, fillRate: '90%' }, { id: '2', event: 'Tech Summit 2026', date: 'Jul 20, 2026', attendees: 320, capacity: 400, fillRate: '80%' }, { id: '3', event: 'Food & Wine Festival', date: 'Aug 17, 2026', attendees: 544, capacity: 600, fillRate: '91%' }, { id: '4', event: 'Art Expo Berlin', date: 'Jul 28, 2026', attendees: 200, capacity: 200, fillRate: '100%' }, ]; // ─── Dashboard ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const DashboardPage = () => ( Dashboard Overview Welcome back! You have 3 events starting this week. Total Events 24 Tickets Sold 1,849 Revenue Net revenue after fees and refunds $45,230 Upcoming 8 Upcoming Events Event Date Venue Tickets Sold Status {upcomingEventsData.map(row => ( {row.event} {row.date} {row.venue} {row.tickets} ))}
); // ─── Events ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── interface EventsPageProps { search: string; onSearch: (v: string) => void; } const EventsPage = ({ search, onSearch }: EventsPageProps) => { const filtered = allEventsData.filter(e => e.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || e.location.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ); return ( Events Create Event

passed.description: Dialog for create event / sign out
No onClick on Marigold Button components
AppLayout component for app shell structure
